ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "catalyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the catalyst used in the experiment */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reaction type (e.g., combustion, synthesis) */,
  "observation_no" INTEGER /* Observation number for the experiment */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of n-Heptane to Acetylene (%) */,
  "reactor_temperature" REAL /* Reactor temperature (˚C) */,
  "h2_to_heptane_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of H2 to n-Heptane (mole ratio) */,
  "contact_time" REAL /* Contact time (sec) */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, paused, canceled) */,
  "experiment_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment in hours */,
  "experiment_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_catalyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("catalyst_id") REFERENCES catalysts ("catalyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalysts" (
  "catalyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalyst */,
  "catalyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalyst */,
  "catalyst_type" TEXT /* Type of catalyst (e.g., metal, metal-oxide) */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the catalyst (m²/g) */,
  "pore_size" REAL /* Pore size of the catalyst (nm) */,
  "catalyst_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the catalyst */,
  "catalyst_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the catalyst */,
  "catalyst_purity" REAL /* Purity of the catalyst (percentage) */,
  "catalyst_production_date" TEXT /* Date of production of the catalyst */,
  "catalyst_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the catalyst */,
  "catalyst_cost" REAL /* Cost of the catalyst per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., combustion, synthesis) */,
  "reaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the reaction was first documented */,
  "reaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the reaction (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "reaction_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the reaction */,
  "reaction_duration" REAL /* Typical duration of the reaction in hours */,
  "reaction_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of conducting the reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, lab technician) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., reactor temperature, contact time) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter range */,
  "parameter_range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalyst_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "catalyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the catalyst the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., surface area, pore size) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "property_range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the property range */,
  "property_range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the property range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalyst_properties_catalyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("catalyst_id") REFERENCES catalysts ("catalyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "condition_value" REAL /* Value of the condition */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition value */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the condition range */,
  "condition_range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the condition range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_conditions_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., conversion rate, yield) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the result range */,
  "result_range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the result range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
